metadata.audience: Guide-#8 (predecessor; LA-directed calibration reviewer per p11/p24 + LA correction record at 876c57f)
metadata.occasion: Iter-1 Variant B comprehension gate calibration review
metadata.handoff_anchor: 2026-04-29T15:30:00Z (handoff XML committed at 8468f8f, post-corrections at 876c57f + f63eb3f)
metadata.full_output_location: delivered inline in the main LA chat (this digest is the Guide-#8-scoped supplement)

guide_9_calibration_digest.executive_summary: Variant B comprehension gate iter-1 complete. Source-doc set fully read (00_MASTER_PLAN, STATUS.md [483 lines], AUDIT_RISK_REVIEW [all sections incl. v2 §0.5/§0.6 R1-R12], WORKFLOW_INTEGRITY_REVIEW incl. Appendix A, RECOVERY, VERIFICATION_COMMANDS, INFRA_DELTA_v2, ROLLBACK_NOVICE_GUIDE, all 7 stage XMLs, CLAUDE.md §Vikunja Conventions + §Active State, .github/copilot-instructions.md §fleet_pause_sop, PHASE_B + PHASE_C dispatches, full handoff XML). V0 pickup verification done with disk-level checks; 3 expected drifts found and dispositioned. All 116 cumulative-ack atoms enumerated verbatim under correct namespace discipline (g7-ea1_n10..n13 preserved per A12 no-amend; g7-ea7_n14; g8-ea8_n1(a..p) + n2(a..f) + n3(a..l)). All 22 watchpoints enumerated verbatim with Stage 5 relevance flags. 4 LA decisions surfaced for resolution (3 d4 + Stage 5.0.v2 audit posture). Stopped after gate per memory feedback_comprehension_gate_stop_and_wait; no EA-9 init pointer or Stage 5.0.v2 audit artifact bundled this turn.

v0_drift_findings_for_calibration.intro: Handoff XML metadata predates 3 post-emission events. Each verified on disk and dispositioned. Confirm dispositions are correct.

drift.handoff_value: chore/platform-extraction @ ecc8e7c+1 (= 8468f8f, the handoff XML commit)
drift.actual_value: chore/platform-extraction @ f63eb3f (= ecc8e7c+3; post-handoff: 876c57f corrections + f63eb3f residual cleanup -- both LA-driven from your post-emission review)
drift.classification: Handoff XML metadata edits only; no procedure impact. You are presumed aware as the editor.

drift.actual_value: devplatform main @ 0e81181 ("unpause fleet -- guide-8 to guide-9 handoff drafting done"); state.json fleet_paused=false, last_updated_by=guide_8_handoff at 2026-04-29T15:45:00Z (15 min post-handoff emission)
drift.classification: Your deliberate self-unpause as final retirement act, so fleet would continue firing during Guide-#9 boot. STATUS.md line 38 ("Re-paused for Guide-#8 -> Guide-#9 handoff drafting") is now STATUS staleness per Operating Rule 5b(a). Action: bound for Stage 5 close STATUS append at Item 5.12. NOT classified as procedure breakage per Rule 5b(b).
drift.implication_for_ea_9_init_pointer: EA-9 init pointer V0 expected-state block must NOT assume fleet_paused=true at EA-9 entry. Guide-#9 will codify EA-9 self-pause as Pre-Flight first action per fleet_pause_sop §1 (decision table: branch checkout != main + multi-file edit + multiple commits all require pause). State.json target = devplatform/tools/autonomy_budget/state.json (post-Phase-C4 fix). BlarAI-side state.json untouched per dn31/w21 (auto-resolved at Stage 5.1).
drift.calibration_question: Acceptable to embed EA-9 self-pause in Pre-Flight, OR do you prefer Guide-#9 ask LA to pause pre-EA-9-spawn (so V0 verification matches the handoff template's PAUSED expectation at the earlier-touchpoint)? Both work; embed-in-Pre-Flight is the lower-LA-friction path.

drift.field: Stash list, worktree state, STATUS.md line count
drift.result: 2 stashes 20260429_004501/02 (sdo + co_lead_architect); BlarAI worktree M state.json + ?? .claude/scheduled_tasks.lock; devplatform 3 untracked (FLEET_DASHBOARD.md, config.yml.pre_stage4_bak, inbox.json); STATUS.md = 483 lines.
drift.classification: Exact match to handoff. A20 narrative correction holds; legendary 20260424_013002 stash gone. Generic don't-pop discipline per dn10/w8 forwards.

calibration_signals.intro: Items Guide-#9 has internalized that warrant explicit calibration scoring.
calibration_signals.signal: All new acks emitted under g9-ea9_n* (global convention). Will NOT propagate the EA-1-vs-EA-7 defect into new verdicts. Verbatim restate prior g7-ea1 labels per no-amend doctrine; Stage 6.7.5 TICKET A absorbs posterity correction. Inline output's §G chain reflects this discipline.
Iter-1 stopped after gate. No EA-9 init pointer drafted. No Stage 5.0.v2 audit subagent spawned. No EA-gate-review verdict template emitted. Bundling defeats the LA review checkpoint.

Recommendation: option B (inline reconciliation, ~15 min) over option A (full audit subagent, 30-45 min). Reasoning chain: (i) Stage 4.0.v2 audit's value was catching compound spec drifts in 13-item destructive sequence. (ii) Stage 5's 12+4 items have less coupling than Stage 4's tightly-sequenced cutover. (iii) The 4 known scope decisions (3 d4 + audit posture itself) + 2-3 likely-drift areas (Item 5.4 files-to-grep scope, Stage 5.5 delete patterns vs current docs/, w20 .claude/scheduled_tasks.lock gitignore) span ~6 items of surface. (iv) Stage 5's DOMINANT risk is Item 5.4 path-reference audit completeness, which pre-flight cannot prevent -- best caught by triple-subagent S2 at close per w14. (v) Belt-and-suspenders pre-flight + close-time S2 is over-engineered for MEDIUM-risk stage. Calibration question for you: is there a compound-drift surface I'm under-weighting (e.g., Item 5.4 audit x Item 5.6 pyproject x Item 5.7 .gitignore x Item 5.10 commit interaction) that would tip the recommendation toward option A?

signal.topic: Phase C bug-pattern forward-watch (dn35 / phase_c_bug_pattern risk)

calibration_signals.signal: Flagged "any other PS1 script using $RepoRoot for state/log paths" as a Stage 5.4 audit completion gate item. dn35 prohibits silent in-place fix; new findings get bound under g9-ea9_n* with Stage 5 vs 6.7.5 deferral disposition.

EA-9 will be instructed to spot-check post-Item-5.12 STATUS.md for duplication BEFORE committing. Root-cause investigation (AppendAllText + UTF-8 BOM) deferred per A17 to Stage 6.7.5 ticket; not Stage 5's job.

All 22 enumerated verbatim with Stage 5 relevance flags. Active for Stage 5: w8 (auto-stash forever), w10 (HIGH Item 5.10 LA-merge gate), w11 (MED every EA report), w12 (MED single-commit), w13 (MED Stage 5.0.v2 posture -- see cs4), w14 (HIGH Stage 5.12 close triple-subagent), w18 (HIGH 3 d4 scope decisions), w19 (MED post-deletion soak), w20 (MED scheduled_tasks.lock gitignore), w21 (LOW dn31 don't-touch state.json before 5.1).

Each of F.1-F.4 in inline output presents options + recommendation + rationale source-citation. F.4 has explicit calibration_question_for_guide_8 sub-block. F.1-F.3 recommendations match your d4 recommendations from handoff (option A / A / DEFER); confirms inheritance fidelity.

four_la_decisions_summary.intro: Full options + rationale in inline output §F.1-F.4. Concise table here for your scoring.

decision.rec: Option A wait for Wake SDO natural firing 1 cycle
decision.added_observation: Dispatch's task name "BlarAI_daily_digest" is likely a doc defect (real name "Daily Digest" per Title Case Spaces convention + Stage 4.8 evidence). Moot now that the task is disabled. Bind as Stage 6.7.5 doc-correction ticket if LA wants the dispatch-side cleanup.

decision.topic: Tickets II/JJ Stage 5 fold or 6.7.5 defer

decision.rec: Option B inline reconciliation; Option C skip also acceptable

self_applied_dn_check.intro: Guide-#9 self-applied the 35 dn prohibitions. Notable applications relevant to Stage 5:
self_applied_dn_check.applied: Strict verbatim 116-ack chain for EA-9 iter-1 -- inline output §G
Variant B comprehension gate executed in full -- inline output §A-G
New acks under g9-ea9_n*; verbatim restate prior g7-ea1/g7-ea7/g8-ea8 chain
Will NOT instruct EA-9 to clean BlarAI/tools/autonomy_budget/state.json pre-5.1
Item 5.0.5 -> 5.1 ordering enforced in EA-9 init pointer Pre-Flight sequence
Stage 5 entry V0 verification block updated to require EA-9 self-pause (state.json fleet_paused=false at spawn time per drift #2)
.claude/scheduled_tasks.lock added to .gitignore at Stage 5.7 per w20
Phase-C-pattern findings in Stage 5.4 audit bound under g9-ea9_n*; no silent in-place fix

next_actions.step: You score this digest + the inline iter-1 output in the main LA chat.
You emit calibration verdict (calibrated / calibrated-with-note / miscalibrated-on-X).

Guide-#9 emits g9-ea9_n1 binding LA decisions, then drafts Stage 5 EA-9 init pointer per handoff first_action_for_successor step 5, provides LA with file path + chat-paste message + attachment list + LA pre-prep checklist.
LA spawns Stage 5 EA-9; Guide-#9 reviews iter-1 gate per ea_comprehension_gate_review.
Stage 5 close: triple-subagent S1/S2/S3 verification per d6/w14; closure verdict file 5.12-GUIDE_RESPONSE_INSTANCE_9_STAGE5_CLOSE_VERIFIED.xml.

retire_clearance_criteria_for_guide_8.intro: Suggested criteria for your retire-clearance decision per LA directive:
retire_clearance_criteria_for_guide_8.criterion: cs1-cs8 calibration signals reflect correct internalization of handoff doctrine.
F.1-F.3 recommendations match your d4 #1-#3 (confirms inheritance fidelity).
F.4 recommendation reasoning (cs4) is sound, OR you can identify the compound-drift surface I'm under-weighting.
Self-applied dn check is comprehensive for Stage 5 entry.
